title: Mesmerizing Charred Spanish Octopus Pulpo A La Gallega
description: Charred and flaky Spanish octopus with bowtie pasta, this pulpo a la gallega is a pescatarian friendly meal prep dish with an al dente finish.

ingredients.name: octopus
ingredients.notes: cleaned and cut into small pieces

instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the bowtie pasta until it is al dente.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium high heat and char the octopus for 2-3 minutes on each side.
Add the smoked paprika, garlic, lemon juice, salt, and black pepper to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the cooked pasta to the skillet and toss to combine with the octopus and sauce.
Transfer the pasta and octopus to a serving platter and serve immediately.
Garnish with lemon wedges and chopped fresh parsley if desired.
Let the dish cool to room temperature before refrigerating or freezing for meal prep.
Reheat the dish in the microwave or oven until warmed through before serving.
